# Copilot instructions for TradingSimulator

- Keep changes minimal and focused on the requested task.
- This project is intentionally simple: all app code lives in `/index.html` (HTML, CSS, and JavaScript together).
- Do not introduce new build tools, frameworks, or dependencies unless explicitly requested.
- There is no automated test or lint setup in this repository; validate changes by loading `index.html` in a browser and exercising the affected UI flow.
- Preserve existing simulator behavior (play/pause/step controls, trading actions, bot execution, charts, and theme toggling).
- If behavior or usage changes, update `README.md` in the same pull request.
